Dec 27th
I tried playing this game with Jonathan and of course he got so upset I don’t know what to do I was already so mad at him I told mommy I have latent anger which i think is what she has. he laid on the floor like a baby and then he said it’s time to go home which I already knew - we got through like 3 memories daddy stealing my pen, his dad leaving him at golf, and Sean leaving my house and then coming right back (Sean called while we were having lunch at Tartine and he said like “fuck off, Sean” and I told Sean and he said why? because Jonathan is the King of Europe and he’s like a random person he wants to kill. I want to tell Jonathan but maybe I  shouldn’t.

I told mommy that I wish I could stop seeing him but i can’t because I’m obsessed with him. After last night when he was blatently not listening to me I think I got a little less attached today i was so angry last night I couldn’t sleep for 3 hours and couldn’t fall back to sleep. We had sex and he edged me finally he got it right and I came like I do when I masterbate - squirting everywhere and then he made me jerk him off forever and eventually he came and it was kinda hot. Maybe it’s all for the best. We’re going to New Years and I’m kind of nervous for him to meet someone who he likes more than me. It’s hard for me to imagine someone putting up with him more than I do. Anyway, he said I made “an excellent impression” on his family and that Barb liked me who I couldn’t stand - would not stop talking to me.

Anyway - my games coming along - played it with Sandy and M and D last night for exactlyish 3 hours and Sandy started coming up with his own prompts and it developed into a sub game where he could read a prompt and then see who had stories for it and tally  1-4/4. I’m in some liminal space between figuring out the answer for how to make the best game possible and accepting it exactly as is and just encouraging myself (Evan’s voice in my head maybe) and trying to make the game mechanics better and more fun and also just the ill tedium of finding new cards and reading through so much weird crap and the weird feeling of getting to the top and realizing I still have nothing ok and clicking 6 generations and they all found a way to be crazy or wrong.

now I’m wondering if I can generalize about other people’s speeches because I realize that I don’t want to say anything I’m thinking - I can’t - there is no objective truth in this world. When it comes to people it’s all just games and navigating tricky egos. is this true?: Maybe there’s some connection but it’s fake and false and fleeting.

Today he said I had a clear vision and something like “Whoa! You really are an artist” I feel validated or vindicated about that - I love the black and white pictures and he said “Oh! you really are an artist” I wish I could get him to admit it that he should have responded. He also told me - when I explained about cognitive vehicles that I am brilliant versus his therapist who was trained - I forget and want to forget the way she said it.

All I can do is compare and contrast this confetti cake feeling with the loss I would feel if I’d expressed myself - instead of grabbing his hand and swallowing and stomaching every thought and feeling and potential action that came from within - the problem is it’s an insane conclusion to come to - it’s 4th quarter - I won’t be able to grasp it because it just makes no sense. (missing? - idk)

December 28th (1:44AM -)
I worked in the garage for a while and got kind of excited about doing all the repetitive tasks and how many there are to do ex. tarot + extras to send to FBA, I can make more/infinite AC and AC + MCs once I get the booklets. And same with the oil sets. I do need to order the pendulums - I’m not sure exactly when I’ll run out of spoons or if I have more anymore. And then that leads me into making smudge bags for the huge kits and now I have candles (need to order more colored candles - maybe make sets and see what’s missing and weirdly get them from new age again - maybe make a listing with the candle holder - set of candles + candle holder… other listings are: mini kit, and just take better pictures - see if that improves and consider doing that for the 29oz kit. I also can make the magic rituals deck, the flower deck, and the pocket grimoire and if they sell maybe ask kasey to do the magical creatures.

I think I might finally he making progress with XI - I now know how hard it is to think about certain prompts and the theory I just solidified (came up with is that there’s 1 impetus - memory drawer opener, and then another label to label the drawer once it’s open for example had to prove something in a weird way - I don’t even know the story it’s attached to but it doesn’t bring up anything except the matthew holiday story - ok - like - looked - made myself look had to prove a point - actually I have the Blake Spanish story to prove that point. Anyway - the other thing I was thinking was a parallel game that is maybe more aligned with my original intention called “hinge” in which you basically find the venn diagram with your stories. Daddy, pen police - oh - I suppose - if you heard a story, and then you could use one of the cards in your hand to tell a new story with the connection.

No idea how hard that would be and you could just pay them on top of the pile, so - sort of like uno, in that the connection - the hinge - is the story itself. Theoretically, could write 2 words to describe the story and add it as a card. And also everyone would get like 1-2 wild cards per round or per game - that would encourage them to think of their own hinges. I think maybe someone else has to tell a story using both the original prompt and the new prompt or another way to reuse wild cards anyway - could also make all the black salt bottles. I’m almost excited to start making some new XI cards if I could @@PB@@ just randomly generate a list that would make ideal images.

December 29th
Went to the Reel Inn with Sandy this morning. About to put on corduroys and my white Brandy vest. Going to Auntie Florence’s party. Watching a sad break up on Love is Blind because it was clear that he didn’t love her the whole time which is a fear of mine (underlying bad intentions that lay dormant or latent for long periods of time). Sandy and I texted each other about going to the Reel Inn at exactly the same time and he told me an interesting story about discovering Ian has a different outlook.

I wonder if Sandy and I do and if we would talk about it and in general, if people could accept that they’re different from each other and still choose to coexist. Maybe that’s why the enemies to lovers troupe works so well because you do the hard part - the last few steps - at the beginning - like eating gelato before dinner so when you get to the end you don’t have to do it and once it’s done, maybe you say - you know what - the rest isn’t actually that bad - we accepted each other’s differences maybe we’re already there.

Feel like I’ve been feeling clearer about what needs to be done with the early retirement goal in mind like making tons of 1s and 2s oils - not being blinded by what I wish would sell - @@PB@@ putting the mineralogy deck in the back cause the AC is perfect and we both picked the picture, trying out the magic deck cause of sunk cost not fallacy. Maddie - I was thinking about them in the bathroom convincing myself I should just wait for her to text me, and then they did but I still got an anxious pit when it came to planning a date to hang out - maybe I just was planning to have 2 free days from socializing before the party - I am excited to see them and I do miss them - they’ve been in my dreams - Lindsay too. M texted me and the screen was my eyes.

In the shower I thought - the frustration of a lack of linearity because once something got in my mind, it was still in my mind was actually solved by the problem that (?) become the cross word puzzle layout and the new rules - laying cards on top of each other to make them more precious and fleeting. Tell Evan to rewrite the instructions. And the magic of thinking about the concrete thing, and then thinking it out with the abstract cards - the magic combo - the addictive property, and looking like a chess board with a white vs. black border? It couldn’t be solved to include “best storyteller,” plot twist etc.

went to auntie Florence’s - just go back Played white elephant. December 30th 7:14 At the Reel Inn. Got a cookie at Bristol Farms - peanut butter and the lady was really nice and reminded me of Hannah Jiles who I’m apparently a fan of. Nice to be a fan of someone and she knows Sofia - the girl I like from Call Her Daddy. Not super efficient - I went all the way up the coast - spent $36 at the Bins (no idea what I got - guess I’ll see -a table etc. Then back and to the cookie. It got dark while I was in there. Really enjoying the sky - blue, with light coming down. Seemed to be a different abstract painting everytime I loked at it.

Tot: I didn’t stop to look at the coast because driving down it (better than) an ant, and that undermines us thinking ants are pathetic. An ant in a bright red race car “I’m going to conquer my fmall size. Didn’t connect it but now I am to the thought I had on the california incline wondering about the traffic, wishing I could see, (contraption Larry David) → ok wait, I can - cause humans invented this thing that maps people (as little points of light from their phones) Honestly, given the possibilities it’s kind of amazing nothing more nefarious has taken place with the technology - some supreme dictator to take over the world.

I wanted to take a river to the moon when deciding where I’d like to read my journal. Someone like with a 145 IQ could shut off everyone’s phone. I wanted to make a tik tok about competition and there are some weird days, where, if you follow the pattern, then “oops, I ended up sitting in the bus sea (all 4 hours) with the person I wanted. Worried that it would be like that going to my grave. No one would suspect the intention. “(whoops - just fell into my grave next to the person I wanted to. Now I have/can spend eternitey with them. Imagine hating your spouse and having to buried next to them.

January 1st New year. Pretty good day today after all the hooplah last night. We visited the tide pools in malibu and hleped Robert and Naomi pick out a car (golf like mine?) Sat on the rug and drank a $100 bottle of champagne from Wally’s that was pink and J didn’t like - he laid on me on the rug like a bear and tried to figure out what animal he was (me and Jame) and we talked about taxes (with Naomi) and James said he programs memory games for neuroresearch (!) I was a bit scared to go in the tide pools, primarily cause the stuff under the feet was so gross. However, with a bit of encouragement from J, I did end up stepping on whatever that weird stuff was. I feel very out of my element. @@PB@@ like things are happening to a new me. Netanel - my Uber driver told me to be jewish and that it was the best convo of 2025 (ha) Had a nice time chilling

January 5th (from ‘meta journal’) Ended up typing out all these journal entries that were unnecessary - I learned so much about my relationship with Zach and Niha and Maddie and Evan and Sean and Jonathan and I am no closer and also feel like I am getting further away from my goal - turning into a fluorescent light. This maybe happens when I haven’t showered in a while. I did technically have a good day today - I did my malibu thing - drove the PCH and went to the bins - I told Jonathan I got him some clothes and he sounded excited. I think he will like the sweater and maybe the two pairs of pants.

I almost drove to Ventura but then I thought the thing I like about Ventura is that it’s a little town near where I was camping - kept telling myself jokes like this and thinking I was so funny. So why did I get home and think I did not have a good day. The stressful interaction with the truck (or was it fun?) the man sitting next to me, and explaining to him

the nice woman that I like looking at the sun - that I drove 45 minutes just to do that - almost looked up to see if there’s any benefits to sun coming through a window. It felt like Jonathan telling his brother I have health anxiety - a secret that doesn’t need to be a secret. Still some cookie left from the campfire - I can be pretty sure J ate his lol. I’ll be honest - it was nice to hear from him - it made my day better - as much as I thought I didn’t care, or I was just hopelessly depressed, it was nice to have a friend - maybe I should tell him that if it’s not on my to do list. He left cause he wanted to write a song. Is he jealous of his mom and bro going to Syracuse?

Anyway - so many notebooks and so little time. Pre-Tot (pun): we’re working on different things - I’m working on changing my mind. (Also: I do think about mediation, I just don’t like to talk @@PB@@ about it - it feels wrong. Finally I’m having fun journaling (ooh wait - I had fun all day) - maybe it’s just the rote computer time. Oh and feeling like I’m not getting anywhere. Oh - to think of a procedure - to go through all my notebooks and find where I don’t talk about how I feel about people - nothing “practical” in the sense that journaling is to make your emotions feel better. Only recreational journaling. :)

Oh, but there’s infinite times that I can fail and try again, but let’s think of a new procedure, goal being to keep the big picture in mind. Ok - I think - step one - number all the journals so they’re in chronological order - maybe starting at January 24’ OR: make one master notion page that has all the journals chronologically and then print it (add the diagrams later somehow) which means I need to make sure most of it is typed. I guess if I recenter myself in what I was doing - I seemed to be missing August. @@PB@@ I know I have all of September. I should check October I guess.

January 9th
Been an emotional day today - not just for me but for probably everyone. Went to Beverly Hills to get cleaner air - we decided on luxury once he gave up on a yellow area. Met a lady shopping for pajamas  and she teared up about her house burning in the fire :( I wanted to put my arm around her but: thought it’d be weird so I didn’t. It felt like a weird day - it’s like a day you go to the dentist. Yesterday I spent all day driving around with daddy - first checking with everyone else about the street to the PCH and there was a horde of people upset - said people had come out with suitcases yelling about something and another guy wanted to get his dog and eyes were tearing there was a lady cop in green cop blocking the crosswalk to San Vicente.

Mommy and I went pajama shopping and to Eataly and went to beautiful Beverly Hills breakfast place and had DIY omelettes and the waiter was nice and didn’t charge extra for avocado. Nice room with big windows and felt like a relief - luxury. Been kinda worried about my lungs and mommy’s been packing everything we own in the living room which feels crazy to me but can’t really get involved. I know I didn’t wanna start going through my stuff - don’t need to add that kind of Hysteria to my mindset. Annoyed me that Maddie cancelled like ok fine - we didn’t have to hang out. I don’t really care but maybe just say you don’t wanna be friends anyone? A bunch of people checked on me which was really sweet  - Lindsay, Sebastian, Niha, Sam Chin, Ciara (from NY), Ahmed who didn’t  text back Austin and Katherine. I guess Evan though not till today. Maddie didn’t

Anyway - daddy and I got a smog check and then he wanted me to fill my $1k order to London (6 medium kits) which was actually a good idea cause the post office was randomly closed today - Jimmy Carter day which was kinda nice but then I had nothing to and then mommy and daddy and I went to Noma and the food wasn’t great and they were mean but I am trying to get along better with M & D like - be mindful of things that randomly bother them even if they don’t make sense. Mommy and I did kinda get in a screaming fight in the car cause she leaves her phone volume so loud and I am sick of it.
Daddy and I went to Tocaya and then I did like three loads of laundry - whites, blacks, then 2-3 of the bins clothes which are ok. Might start a store.

January 12th Ooh I was mad last night. Mad mad mad - so mad I don’t even know ow I could be that mad. Still kind of mad. Kind of dreading talking to him. All my happy places that I go to get away from this feeling burned down.

9:46 PM Went out with Jonathan today went to Melrose Flea Market. I couldn’t do it - couldn’t keep my composure - just a bundle of sticks, falling apart - listlessly rifling through so many clothes not finding anything I wanted to buy…like that yellow and orange mezuzah I made at camp. Learned about self-harm last night pinching my own leg cause I didn’t know what to do. Jonathan came to get me at the Bodega Wine Bar where I was holding back tears after getting off the phone with him. We talked in his car and he gave me this whole spiel about how he takes care of me emotionally and I said (after I listened) no - it’s just cause you broke a promise - tried to explain about conditionals - I still want to know if/how much was malicious vs. negligence.

I started almost crying sitting @@PB@@ on the bench when I thought about how he didn’t care enough to check if I’d messaged him back - it comes down to him not caring, which, I don’t like - maybe malicious would be better? He did say “i care about you” when he was leaving today. no idk. Anyway - weird coincidence but I had just gotten up from my nap where I was actually crying - tears and all - saying “I hate you! I hate you” over and over (and: your the worst person ever - why does it feel (so) good to be (so) dramatic? Anyway - decided - “I’m gonna call Grant” and guess what: he had just texted me - I immediately called him and he invited me to come and watch him meal prep starting on Sunday - I thought we were gonna eat but actually it was just meal prep and I was so confused.

I was actually relieved to leave and I got to do my best and most favorite thing - I tried a new ramen place - it was good - nice and spicy with an egg and tofu and all the toppings (3/5) I wanted and I ate it by myself watching depressing footage of people that lost their houses but some how it was enjoyable to watch. Tomorrow going to a movie with Evan, Maddie, Lindsay, Noa and Olivia Goffman (?) I was annoyed

that Gr (missing)

Jonathan came in his own eye while we were fucking and it was the best thing ever (miss) He wanted me to draw a diagram of the logistics of it Have been sleeping in mommy’s room with the air filter on full blast which is the OG white noise. I did all my laundry and now it’s in a basket which is nice. I’m so sick of being angry. Why can’t people treat me well and then I wouldn’t have to be angry. I don’t like being angry. I want my anger to go somewhere - I hate it - I hate them who? them. Jonathan and Grant for not knowing that I’m so smart (and smarter than them) and they just see me as a body ew . It’s one thing to be plain about what you want - it’s another to try

to trick someone into betraying themselves. (missing)And then in the car back - he said it was torturing him that I was so tortured. And I was - just wanted to get home. And didn’t tell him anything that was wrong. (missing) I’m scared to go to bed cause I had such a bad time sleeping (trying to sleep) last night, I was so mad and I was

January 14th Having a very nice time, although I’m also very anxious and upset (at the same time). Reading my September journals - I went through every possible translation and settled on just reading the damn journal - it’s out of order - it’s missing some things. But it’s not bothering me right now. Yesterday went to see Nosferatu with Evan, Maddie, and Lindsay, and it was nice - a very nice end to what was already a very nice day - I walked to Primo Passo and had that nice dream and got a cookie and did a little bit more than the bare minimum of my orders (made 2 medium kits and two travel kits and it wasn’t too bad (might’ve been daunting some other time). Got a cinnamon bun at Bristol Farms - I’ve been thinking about cinnamon for a while now - since I met Cassie (?) and decided to finally get it cause the PB cookie guy was washing something in the sink - ignoring me - I hate him :)

Nosferatu was good - like four hours of long slow shots of people’s fingernails - close ups on people’s faces dramatized - white, scared, sweating. I closed my eyes cause I can’t stand gross things. But Leighton Meester was so beautiful and pure in her terror - she really made the whole thing. Plot was pure and simple - hardly any surprises. I guess I was in the mood for those kinds of dresses.
@@PB@@
Evan sat next to me and explained everything really close in my ear I was almost kissing him cause he had free tickets from a blood drive but two had gotten crumpled in his wallet and Maddie had to scan them.

Really I’m always against the lack of interaction of watching something when you could be talking but I was too anxious about hanging out with them and I didn’t have to deflect Lindsay’s constant attacks which hilariously seems like an ongoing problem that Maddie is always dealing with - like a leak in a basement that she likes. Appreciated that I would never have seen that movie otherwise, so it was special in that way too - like trying a new food)(enjoying things that I don’t normally like)(→ the short time of hanging out with Grant and having to rebuke his rebuffs (dismantled list - my fav joke right now that no one else gets and no one else wants to get even if I could or would explain it to them) I think I handled the small dose of underhand-edness that I received due to the grant hang very well and I am proud of you.

And grateful (since apparently this is now a gratitude journal 🙄) about the Ramen place that was right there and that had everything I wanted - all the toppings - would’ve gotten an extra egg if I believed in myself more I guess. Grateful for sharing with Marlon the other day - the small sip of their espresso, and the bottom of their cheesecake and the fact that Sonia and Marlon ignored me “trying” both of their same things that they got (plain cheesecake)…like a dismantled list in its slovely (slightly/lovely) flawed logic for some reason I feel like it goes off in little veins one way the logic goes one way - the other way, the logic goes the other way - you can follow the logic “on both ends,” but it doesn’t end up at the same place. Hence: “varicosely” to describe it.

I guess I related most to the ugly bald guy - the servant who ledges his soul and then dies at the end cause his master preferred a prettier servant - I don’t know why - maybe because he ate the head off a pigeon and that feels like me - doing stuff that people don’t understand and the way he was petting the bird “pretty bird - master gets me pretty things” and the bird, it’s true, was beautiful - gold and blue, like eyes, like the flecks in eyes - the way you start noticing more colors if you look closely and the beady - and then the beady two part eyes - (pic) - just round circles, stuck in a - set in a - flecked eye face.

I navigated all the hard parts of going to the century city theater, accepting them as they came, without undue anxiety - didn’t resort to: “oh my god - this is horrible - I wish I wasn’t here” - and that’s that cinnamon smell - accepting everything. The sweet smell - spicy and that’s nice. Note: the braids on that young lady outside are very nice. I wish I would start wearing braids @@PB@@ again, but I don’t really want to (savor the flaw in my logic). To do: think about Chase - in close proximity - if I wanted, I could go there (right now) and maybe tell them - not even have to pretend that I’m a private client - whatever that means.

It means that when I go to Blick to get 1,2,3,4,5,6 paints I don’t have to pretend to be too grateful when someone else buys my paints, Grant couldn’t decide if he should ask me “I thought you were poly (it never felt like poly actually) and I had to wonder if I should ask him “wait - I thought you said - you just wanted to be friends” - a 2 line texting conversation with an impressive number of possible discrepances - interpretations - misinterpretations - pretend misinterpretations - intentional - pretend intentional misinterpretations (”I don’t know - I have rules about not thinking about stuff too much”) Oh fuck - I pulled a bleeding glump from my nose and now I have to think: oh good…bad things could happen to me - my bleeding glumph could turn into a bleeding glumphette and then I would really have to think about it. “A bleeding glumphette” - now what am I going to do about that?”

I guess this is the game that I am playing - or the game that I was already (always) playing - trying to find a thought @@PB@@ to thin to make the serotonin jump, and the rules are that you just go through all your thoughts and wait to see what chemical it will produce, and once you’re done knowing what chemical it is going to produce, then you can stop thinking the thought, OR if it is the right kind of thought, then you can “start” thinking it - saying to yourself “oh wow, this is the thought that I was supposed to think” Now I’m thinking this thought and I’m done. The serotonin’s all come) (this level)(→ going up a level no! that’s not what I mean, but that’s a))

((→ for: forgetting too many things - wanting to have too many things in your mind at once…going up a level of abstraction - feels real weird - and kinda magical - like that moment I realized I was a magician in the apartment with matt when I was smoking weed when I was in the elevator going down - like finding a magician in the wild - the jump scare of the monster - “oh wow - but it was me all along.” And now here’s the daisy chain I remember - grant - I planned on calling him all day. i also wasn’t gonna call him before he called me. Charlie and January 11th. Planning to leave LA that day - and Zach - all the coincidences that happened with that. god, grant me the power to accept that I don’t want to hook up with Grant - like Leighton didn’t want to hook up with the monster - I would like to say “I abhor you” to the monster

Little girl playing with shapes kept staring at me and saying “uh oh” and I was like “aww cute” but then it turned out she’d dropped a yellow ‘barooma’ (the shape) by my shoe, and so I had to get it. Problem solved. Now that I realize there was a problem. I had a thought stuck in the back of my head, and I couldn’t get it out, cause I didn’t know it was there.

Anyway, here we go, the thought is: breaking the rules in art - breaking one rule (professor malarky and his unpleasant shell - dead - read paper - missed opportunity) (()) when I was talking to daddy - if you are in the mindset, then you can break some or one of the rules - and that shows - if you only break one - that you are in the mindset - a symptom - a very specific thing you can look for. Directive: (as a joke) remember to think about that sister bear book where she beats them at marbles as a metaphor - as for why (?) have boy clubs to begin with, and why it’s not fun to lose all the time - take 2-3 today, maybe 4-5 tomorrow - taper off around 7 or as directed by a physician.

January 14th (Blue Bottle Coffee) Ok so this is not a continuation of the letter to J (at the back) but it is 1) related, and 2) started from that. So the pre-tot is trying to prove that I have a better sense of humor) or that he doesn’t understand my jokes, like that one I made for his brother at Christmas. And then it came back to this general theory that basically - you need to have a shared assumption - an underlying belief - to find something funny. So, a lot of my (favorite) jokes are about, start with, the assumption that logic breaks down when things get really large or small and so the reference for the “displaced list” (Jacob - Charlie… … …) is that people will basically accept anything, as long as it’s in ex, the format of a list (the displaced list lists 2 or more items that are synonyms of each other and are not different, and pretends that they are different, because they are in the format of a list.)

and so, the reason, ostensibly, that someone that Jonathan does not understand all the jokes I make is that he doesn’t have the same heuristics in mind (heuristics - synonym for list etc. - pun unintended). This brings me to my second “point,” which is actually where this essay started, or started in the past. With that trip I took with Brenda where she was trying to figure out whether I was friends with Charlie, or if there was ore going on. She concluded that he treated me differently - like his guy friends - that we made jokes and laughed the way his guy friends did, and (by the way, Brenda is beautiful and I don’t know if she actually wanted to be friends with me/we had a suspicious friendship) which maybe was about holding her enemies close…but her sense of humor was often referencing things that she found funny about the world, about humans, about men.

And to me, it wasn’t “pure” humor, cause the jokes weren’t actually funny - they just allowed the two participants to refer back to, or think together about this assumption they had. Like: “Trump bad cuz orange hair” is only funny if you already don’t like Trump. On the other hand, me and Charlie were making just insane imaginary scenarios (which were also referring to stuff, but they were maybe more funny, and less political activist) Anyway - this reminds me of Fairfield Porter essay about pure art vs. politics “art is not pure art…” etc. And so, finally, we reach the conclusion, which is not about the content at all, but undoes Sieberman’s plastic as a map of the brain - the way the brain remembers concepts - as a map - constellation. (this is the part I was most interested in maybe (?) (explore more…?)

on the beach
forgot I meant to write this down before - I was thinking while watching Nosferatu - my movie-watching-resolution - write my book - I’m too scared - I’m so scared - I think I might be able to do it. I’m not sure the purpose - at the moment I’ll just “send it to Ramachandran” Anyway - it’s basically - the changing of the gaurd - the few times I changed systems…because right now I was using teeth clicking, but right now I went back to electro-magnetic impulses in the tips of my fingers - very subtle thing to decide if I should go to the library or blue bottle or goodwill while crossing the street.

#strange paradox: I was happy to go to Nautchaug for three months and the whole time I didn’t think a single thought, at least not so far as the monster could see - Nautchaug was my Thomas. I just let myself be directed sort of like a pendulum except the “tip”is anything that my body does. And then it led to me becoming Sophie when I started going on dates - that was the personality of that (lack of a) system. The colors personality wanted to kill itself (it was depressed ← joke) - the colors one was very nice though - lots of pictures to look at :) The finger system is the same I use to find out if I’m still tired - if my fingers produce impulses, I need to go back to sleep.

‘THE BENEFITS OF HOMELESSNESS’ When there are no rules - when there are so many rules that there are no rules - so many new things are possible. And being homeless is a consequence of that. Bound by physics and time, and distance (DL) there was no route home if I had nothing to get me there and could only thing one, maybe two steps into the future (without changing my mind) If you can leave your house at any point in time - with anything (or without) there’s nothing to stop you, and you could end up in the streets at three in the morning, looking for an outlet to charge your phone.

there were so many steps to: getting home, and they replayed like a child learning piano - starting over and over the notes - from where they went wrong - and then starting over. Find an outlet. Or: buy a charger. Convenience store - where is it? These were the goals. My mind, led by the crows, though, as flitting as the wind blowing the sky. But it’s not so bad being homeless. First off - there’s plenty of food. And all you need is to eat and sleep. There are tricks that I never needed - you can sleep outside during the day (because it is cold at night. And it is hard to sleep when it’s cold). Public places are libraries (computers, work, job)

Starbucks
Worried and excited to finish this notebook - only out of sheer necessity since I’ve had it all day. Now at least I have a good justification for leaving all my notebooks with pages in the back. Anyway - the cashier at goodwill had such a nice smile and was impressed that he could scan my coupon on my phone. I played harder and got nice things - a scorpion dress - just when I felt I should give up - the moral of the story is that I think i could actually wear all or most of the stuff I bought. I had a pretty nice day today - very mellow, but consistently ok mindset which is a goal of mine.

I went to the beach and the pier - annoying, black raspy buy singing candy man and everyone was looking at the destruction of the fire - groups of guys discussing it like they were doing work - building a damn - that mountain over there - nice looking boys - 3 sets - one older. Everyone was feeling different cause the fires are done - everyone talking about it at Primo Passo - the sales guy at goodwill said “I hope no one you know was injured in the fire” and he said ‘Just one - my friend Max” or something and then sort of walked away, and I was left to say “oh, ok,” like I was relieved - what?!

Phone died which was heaven and then I charged it at Pacsun Brandy and now I’m back in hell waiting for someone to text me though I have like 9 people to text back - 14 messages - 5 to ghost (jk) was beautifully hot in the sand and (?) to the middle - not the shore, not the not shore, and took off my shoes (and socks) and dipped my toes in the sand like I never do - it’s not usually worth it - I have a transitive phobia from Lorien.

I also found a (pic: button down shirt) xs for women - pattern is not bad, a wedding dress but just the top cause that was the main reason I wanted to get married (lace sleeves) and now my denial can be pure and complete. Cashier lovingly tucked all my stuff into my new Rekyjavic backpack and told me that it was valuable, and didn’t notice that I am awkward at making conversation as though I have a lag but not cause I have a lag. Then he pulled the strings and I wasn’t paying attention - wondering why it was taking to long but then looked, and he was lovingly buttoning the buttons.

See Jonathan: everyone is nice to me - everyone likes me ok, one person liked me once (he likes this (kind of joke)) → the reference: we are lying to ourselves, exaggerating to ourselves. All day I dreaded dropping Sonia’s dress off and then “i” made myself time it just perfectly by texting her with just enough time to drop it and then haven’t looked at the messages. Was scared to talk to her? Anyone? My new working theory is that - you’re drawn towards people who you like the rules of their mind - the rules that they have for thinking - because, when you’re with them, you automatically adopt a) those rules b) they’re way of seeing the world and c) they’re objective maybe even. So I guess I like being in J’s mind. Or perhaps it makes me feel better about being in my own. Adopting Sonia’s mindset means adopting assumptions that I don’t believe are true - or just thinking vapid thoughts - idk how technical it gets.

Excited to eat the rest of my food later. Excited to hang with Mason tomorrow. Excited to type out my journal when I get home and hopefully finally get to make a new one that is typed with the same color cover (idk why, but I think that’s so funny. And it gives me a “non” arbitrary way to divide it. I gave myself the assignment to design a game that I can play that keeps me busy and is light exercise for my mind - a walk around the block in its repetitiveness - like finding an XS button down cause I actually need it - it’s a game that will be used cause it has a use. Elegant solutions so far: XI - draw a card, write down memories. Drawn another card. Add a (5 minute) time limit? 2) I have a sheet of stickers and I can’t think of what to think about so I’m thinking I could keep the pair of bird scissors in my “purse” and cut out a sticker when I don’t quite know what to think about and insert it into my journal, and use that as a journaling prompt.

Temporary → Permanent: watching VOMIT videos and designing a pattern so I can make my own clothes - a tinge - about to be done - the cherry on top - it’s just missing. And I’m excited to start another journal - I need to, even if I don’t finish this one. Because the next time I write in it, I might be out and about.
